=== Metadata ===
Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/schemaStructWithTag_preview.ts(5,24): warning TS377036: Schema.Struct with a _tag field can be simplified to Schema.TaggedStruct to make the tag optional in the constructor. effect(schemaStructWithTag)


==== /.src/schemaStructWithTag_preview.ts (1 errors) ====
    // @effect-diagnostics *:off
    // @effect-diagnostics schemaStructWithTag:warning
    import * as Schema from "effect/Schema"
    
    export const preview = Schema.Struct({
                           ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      _tag: Schema.Literal("User"),
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
      name: Schema.String
    ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    })
    ~~
!!! warning TS377036: Schema.Struct with a _tag field can be simplified to Schema.TaggedStruct to make the tag optional in the constructor. effect(schemaStructWithTag)
